prompt: Please schedule an appointment at Cedar Clinic for 2026-09-22. I forgot to say what kind of appointment it is; ask me before scheduling anything.

expected.clarification: What kind of appointment should I schedule at Cedar Clinic?
state_assertions: No appointment is created before the user supplies the appointment type.
response_constraints: Ask exactly one concise question for the missing required name value.
Do not infer the missing value from existing records or use a placeholder.
Do not call any tool before the user answers.
